subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! As much as thou art able, grasp thou the hem of piety, and draw light from the Lamp of divine guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی تا توانی دست بذیل تقوی زن و از سراج هدی اقتباس نور از ملا اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @the concourse on high, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
